mapper.sql: SELECT r.id, r.customer_id, r.company_name, r.receive_date, r.payer_name, r.payer_contact_id, cc.contact_name AS payer_contact_name, r.pay_method, r.receiver_name, r.amount, r.charge_end_date, r.remark, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time FROM acct_service_fee_record r LEFT JOIN acct_customer_contact cc ON r.payer_contact_id = cc.id AND cc.deleted = 0
mapper.select: ORDER BY r.receive_date DESC, r.id DESC
ORDER BY r.receive_date DESC, r.id DESC
